ogTitle: Charles Darwin vs Chilla Well: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Charles Darwin and Chilla Well.
heading: Charles Darwin vs Chilla Well — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Charles Darwin, Northern Territory and Chilla Well, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Charles Darwin has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Chilla Well (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Charles Darwin or Chilla Well safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Charles Darwin has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Chilla Well scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Charles Darwin scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Chilla Well scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Charles Darwin or Chilla Well?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Charles Darwin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
